data.name: 女神之戰
data.detailed_description:
Add To Wishlist


關於此遊戲


這是一款以卡組構建為核心的休閒遊戲。
歡迎大家加入官方QQ群：746267157，一鍵加群鏈接：，獲取更多資訊。
在你意想不到的時刻，你被召喚到一個異世界，並通過一幅壁畫獲得了強大的大劍力量。現在，你將面對九位女神，並通過與她們的戰鬥來征服她們。

隨著戰鬥的進行，你將逐漸獲得更多強力的卡牌。通過制定巧妙的策略和運用你卡組中的卡牌，你將能夠戰勝這些女神，最終成為真正的征服者。


26種獨特的卡牌，每張都具有獨特的效果和戰略價值。
九位各具特色的女神，每位女神都有自己獨特的技能和挑戰。
卡組構建的自由度，你可以根據自己的喜好和策略，選擇合適的卡牌組合來應對各種挑戰。
在這個卡牌遊戲中，你將享受到策略性的卡牌對戰，探索異世界的神秘，並體驗成為真正征服者的刺激感。快來挑戰女神，展現你的卡牌技巧吧！

data.supported_languages: 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512M
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: 女神之战
data.detailed_description:
Add To Wishlist


About the Game


This is a casual game primarily focused on deck building.
At an unexpected moment, you are summoned to a different world and obtain the power of a mighty great sword through a mural. In the game, you will face nine goddesses and conquer them through battles.

As the battles progress, you will acquire more powerful cards. By devising clever strategies and utilizing the cards in your deck, you will be able to defeat these goddesses and ultimately become a true conqueror.


26 unique cards, each with its own distinct effect and strategic value.
Nine goddesses, each with their own unique skills and challenges.
Freedom to build your deck, allowing you to choose the perfect combination of cards that suits your preferences and strategies.
In this game, you will enjoy the strategic card battles, explore the mysteries of the otherworld, and experience the thrill of becoming a true conqueror. Challenge the goddesses and showcase your card-playing skills!
